responseMessageContents.title: Successful launch and verification of the global investor capture system.
responseMessageContents.description: The new system for finding and connecting with global investors is now live and fully tested. We have confirmed that every part of the process, from a person searching online to becoming a registered investor, is working correctly in the real system. We also improved the login and security features for the owner.
